AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY VISHNEVSKIY, ALEKSANDR VISHNEVSKAYA, ANNA AS TO DEFENDANT SERVANTES, PATRICK IND.& DBA BAYSHORE TOWING CO. SERVANTES, DUNIA IND.& DBA BAYSHORE TOWING COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-15-1999 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VISHNEVSKIY, ALEKSANDR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SERVANTES, PATRICK IND.& DBA BAYSHORE TOWING CO. SERVANTES, DUNIA IND.& DBA BAYSHORE TOWING COMPANY $1,865.71 PRINCIPAL, $76.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,941.71, ANNA VISHEVSKAYA IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
